series_metadata.series_title: Children's Trust Fund Regional Prevention Council
series_metadata.series_description: Regional Prevention Council Files include copies of requests for applications, grant applications, grant agreements, scoring tools, award letters, reports, invoices, documents pertaining to all eight (8) Regional Prevention Council activities, Ohio Children's Trust Fund (OCTF) Board Council Member Applications, County Board of Commissioners Regional Prevention Council appointment letters, and related email correspondences

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
